title: PvP Revamped
description: A well-made and high-quality texture pack that contains many impactful and helpful changes that benefit players in PvP.
body:
# PvP Revamped

- Low Fire – reduces screen obstruction while fighting
- Low Shield – clearer PvP visibility in fights
- No Explosion Particles & Sounds – cleaner crystal PvP experience
- Optimized Visuals – smooth performance and higher FPS
- Competitive Focused Design – built for serious PvP
- Ideal for Crystal PvP & ranked servers
